23.reason: Error: Should access p->data[p->top-1] because top points to the next empty slot, not the current top element.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Should access p->data[p->top-1] because top points to the next empty slot, not the current top element.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Should access p->data[p->top-1] because top points to the next empty slot, not the current top element.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Accesses element at current top index, but the top index already points to the next empty slot. Should decrement top first, then access.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Should use p->data[p->top-1] to get the top element
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Accessing out of bounds. The top index points to the next empty slot, so the current top element is at p->top - 1. Accessing p->data[p->top] reads uninitialized or garbage memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Accessing out of bounds. The top index points to the next empty slot, so the current top element is at p->top - 1. Accessing p->data[p->top] reads uninitialized or garbage memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  Accessing p->data[p->top] is out of bounds; should be p->data[p->top - 1] because top points to the next empty slot.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  Accessing p->data[p->top] is out of bounds; should be p->data[p->top - 1] because top points to the next empty slot.

43.reason: Missing check for stack full (aaa->top == MAX) before push. Should output "error " if full.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing check for stack full (aaa->top == MAX) before push. Should output "error " if full.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  No check for stack overflow (stack full condition) before pushing.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  No check for stack overflow (push when stack is full). Should verify p->top < MAX before pushing.
